Summary
Senior backend engineer with 9+ years building high-scale distributed systems.
Experience

- Led platform redesign serving 2M MAU and reduced p95 latency by 42%
- Built 8 event-driven services and cut deployment failures by 55%

- Owned billing reliability roadmap and reduced incident count by 48%
- Mentored 6 engineers and standardized SLO playbooks
